steps.title: Show singular possession
steps.content: The sentence refers to one Moon and needs to show that the gravitational pull belongs to the Moon. A singular possessive noun requires an apostrophe followed by s.

steps.title: Reject nonpossessive forms
steps.content: Choice B is a plural form without possession. Choice C is a plural possessive, but the noun is singular. Choice D names the Moon but does not show possession. The sentence needs the singular possessive form. The answer is A.
